text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun's signature racewear has finally
arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She kept the design a secret to surprise me when
it arrived. This will be my first look at the outfit...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ta-da! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Feast your eyes, Trainer! Isn't it awesome? ♪
choice_data_list: I thought it would be frillier for some reason...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I considered that, but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I thought a more grown-up look would suit me
better! What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yay!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
My mom and dad were both really happy when I
showed them the design too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
They said it was cool and it reminded them of my
dad when he was young!
choice_data_list: What does your dad do for a living again?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: He's a pilot—flying through the skies! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
When I was a kid, he would take me out in a small
plane. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The sky went on forever and ever, and my
hometown looked so small and far away!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I really loved soaring around the vast sky. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Flying is actually a lot like racing! It really gets
your heart pounding! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's why I designed my signature racewear to
look like this. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Now I can have fun racing around the track—as
free as back when I was flying!
choice_data_list: Then you'll have to take off in tons of races!
Then you'll have to take off in tons of races!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Now I can have fun racing around the track—as
free as back when I was flying!
choice_data_list: Then you'll have to take off in tons of races!
Then you'll have to take off in tons of races!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Right! Let's flyyy!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll show everyone watching me race just how
incredible the view is from up above! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Make sure you don't miss boarding time, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll be flying even higher from now on, so try to
keep your eyes on me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Do you copy?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ It's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay! ☆ Luck and peace to us both! Mayano Top
Gun, taking off! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun's desire to win is stronger than
ever now that she's tried on her signature
racewear.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna be an expert on all things Maya
before long, huh? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Maybe one day, you'll know even more about me
than my mom and dad... Eeek! ☆
choice_data_list:
Speaking of, have you shown them how you
look in your racewear yet?

Speaking of, have you shown them how you
look in your racewear yet?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Nope, not yet!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I decided a while ago that you were going to be
the one I showed it to first! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're right though! I have to send a picture to
Mom and Dad!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Get in the picture!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Of course! You're cleared for takeoff!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
My parents said they wanna know more about
you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Come on, get closer! Prepare for take off! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, what a great pic! ♪ I'll send it to them
right away!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh! They messaged me back! Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Haha! ♪ They said you look like an incredible
person!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And they say they want you to take good care of
me. Looks like you've got their seal of
approval. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little embarrassed, but my conviction to
support her has been renewed.
